testcases.input: Delivery table: +-------------+-------------+------------+-----------------------------+ | delivery_id | customer_id | order_date | customer_pref_delivery_date | +-------------+-------------+------------+-----------------------------+ | 1 | 1 | 2019-08-01 | 2019-08-02 | | 2 | 2 | 2019-08-02 | 2019-08-02 | | 3 | 1 | 2019-08-11 | 2019-08-12 | | 4 | 3 | 2019-08-24 | 2019-08-24 | | 5 | 3 | 2019-08-21 | 2019-08-22 | | 6 | 2 | 2019-08-11 | 2019-08-13 | | 7 | 4 | 2019-08-09 | 2019-08-09 | +-------------+-------------+------------+-----------------------------+ Output: +----------------------+ | immediate_percentage | +----------------------+ | 50.00 | +----------------------+ Explanation: The customer id 1 has a first order with delivery id 1 and it is scheduled. The customer id 2 has a first order with delivery id 2 and it is immediate. The customer id 3 has a first order with delivery id 5 and it is scheduled. The customer id 4 has a first order with delivery id 7 and it is immediate. Hence, half the customers have immediate first orders.
